subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hearken unto the call of this Youth from this dark and hellish prison, and be not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا غلام اسمع ندآء هذا الغلام عن شطر هذا السجن الدهماء الجهنام و لاتکن
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria)
